exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.description: Lie flat on a bench, grip the bar slightly wider than shoulder-width, lower to mid-chest and press up to full lockout.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bench Press
exercises.description: Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, press up from chest level to full extension while keeping a slight arch in your back.

exercises.name: Incline Barbell Bench Press
exercises.description: Set the bench to 30-45 degrees, grip the bar shoulder-width apart, lower to upper chest and press to lockout.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.description: Set the bench to 30-45 degrees, press dumbbells from shoulder level to full extension, squeezing the chest at the top.

exercises.name: Decline Bench Press
exercises.description: Lie on a decline bench, grip the bar shoulder-width apart, lower to the lower chest and press to lockout, emphasizing the lower pecs.

exercises.name: Cable Flye
exercises.description: Stand between cable pulleys set at shoulder height, bring handles together in a wide arc, squeezing the chest at the midline.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Flye
exercises.description: Lie flat on a bench with arms extended above the chest, lower the dumbbells in a wide arc with a slight bend in the elbows, then squeeze back to the top.

exercises.name: Machine Chest Press
exercises.description: Sit in the machine with handles at chest height, press forward to full extension and return under control.

exercises.name: Push-Up
exercises.description: Start in a plank position with hands slightly wider than shoulder-width, lower your chest to the floor keeping your body rigid, then push back up.

exercises.name: Chest Dip
exercises.description: Lean forward on parallel bars, lower your body until you feel a stretch in the chest, then press back up while maintaining the forward lean.

exercises.name: Barbell Row
exercises.description: Hinge at the hips with a flat back, pull the barbell to your lower ribcage, squeezing your shoulder blades together at the top.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Row
exercises.description: Place one hand and knee on a bench, row the dumbbell to your hip with a neutral grip, keeping your elbow close to your body.

exercises.name: Pull-Up
exercises.description: Hang from a bar with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width, pull your chin above the bar by driving your elbows down and back.

exercises.name: Chin-Up
exercises.description: Hang from a bar with an underhand shoulder-width grip, pull your chin above the bar, engaging both lats and biceps.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.description: Sit at a pulldown machine, grip the bar wide, pull it to your upper chest while leaning slightly back and squeezing the lats.

exercises.name: Cable Row
exercises.description: Sit upright at a low cable station, pull the handle to your midsection while keeping your torso stable and squeezing your back.

exercises.name: T-Bar Row
exercises.description: Straddle a T-bar or landmine, hinge forward and row the weight to your chest, keeping your back flat and core braced.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
exercises.description: Sit with feet on the platform, pull a close-grip handle to your abdomen while keeping your chest up and shoulders back.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.description: Set a cable at head height with a rope attachment, pull toward your face with elbows high, externally rotating at the end.

exercises.name: Inverted Row
exercises.description: Hang under a bar set at waist height, keep your body straight and pull your chest to the bar by retracting your shoulder blades.

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.description: Stand with feet hip-width apart, hinge to grip the bar, then drive through the floor extending hips and knees simultaneously to stand tall.

exercises.name: Straight-Arm Pulldown
exercises.description: Stand facing a high cable with straight arms, push the bar down to your thighs in an arc, squeezing your lats at the bottom.

exercises.name: Overhead Press
exercises.description: Stand with the barbell at shoulder height, press it straight overhead to full lockout while bracing your core and keeping your ribs down.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.description: Sit or stand with dumbbells at shoulder level, press overhead to full extension, keeping your core tight and avoiding excessive arching.

exercises.name: Lateral Raise
exercises.description: Stand with dumbbells at your sides, raise them out to shoulder height with a slight bend in the elbows, leading with your pinkies.

exercises.name: Front Raise
exercises.description: Stand holding dumbbells in front of your thighs, raise one or both arms straight ahead to shoulder height, then lower under control.

exercises.name: Rear Delt Flye
exercises.description: Bend forward at the hips, raise dumbbells out to the sides with slightly bent elbows, squeezing the rear delts at the top.

exercises.name: Arnold Press
exercises.description: Start with dumbbells at chin height palms facing you, rotate your palms outward as you press overhead to full lockout.

exercises.name: Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.description: Stand sideways to a low cable, raise the handle out to shoulder height across your body, controlling the negative on the way down.

exercises.name: Upright Row
exercises.description: Hold a barbell or dumbbells with a narrow grip, pull straight up along your body to chin height, leading with the elbows.

exercises.name: Handstand Push-Up
exercises.description: Kick up into a handstand against a wall, lower your head toward the floor by bending your elbows, then press back to full lockout.

exercises.name: Pike Push-Up
exercises.description: Start in a downward-dog position with hips high, bend your elbows to lower your head toward the floor, then push back up.

exercises.name: Barbell Curl
exercises.description: Stand holding a barbell with an underhand grip at arm's length, curl the bar to shoulder height while keeping your elbows pinned to your sides.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Curl
exercises.description: Stand with dumbbells at your sides, curl them up by flexing at the elbow, supinating your wrists as you lift.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.description: Stand with dumbbells in a neutral grip (palms facing each other), curl up while maintaining the neutral wrist position throughout.

exercises.name: Preacher Curl
exercises.description: Sit at a preacher bench with your upper arms flat on the pad, curl the bar or dumbbells up, preventing any shoulder movement.

exercises.name: Concentration Curl
exercises.description: Sit on a bench with your elbow braced against your inner thigh, curl the dumbbell to your shoulder with strict form.

exercises.name: Cable Curl
exercises.description: Stand facing a low cable with a straight or EZ-bar attachment, curl the handle to shoulder height while keeping your elbows stationary.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
exercises.description: Sit on an incline bench set to 45 degrees, let dumbbells hang at full extension and curl up, getting a deep stretch at the bottom.

exercises.name: EZ-Bar Curl
exercises.description: Stand holding an EZ-bar on the angled grips, curl to shoulder height keeping your wrists in a comfortable semi-supinated position.

exercises.name: Tricep Pushdown
exercises.description: Stand at a high cable with a bar or rope attachment, press down by extending your elbows while keeping your upper arms glued to your sides.

exercises.name: Overhead Tricep Extension
exercises.description: Hold a dumbbell or EZ-bar overhead with both hands, lower it behind your head by bending at the elbows, then extend back to the top.

exercises.name: Skull Crusher
exercises.description: Lie on a bench holding an EZ-bar or dumbbells above your chest, lower the weight toward your forehead by bending at the elbows, then press back up.

exercises.name: Close-Grip Bench Press
exercises.description: Lie on a flat bench with hands shoulder-width apart on the bar, lower to your chest and press up, keeping elbows close to your body.

exercises.name: Diamond Push-Up
exercises.description: Perform a push-up with your hands close together forming a diamond shape under your chest, keeping elbows tight to your body.

exercises.name: Tricep Dip
exercises.description: Support yourself on parallel bars with arms straight, lower by bending your elbows to 90 degrees while keeping your torso upright, then press back up.

exercises.name: Cable Overhead Extension
exercises.description: Face away from a high cable with a rope attachment, extend your arms overhead by straightening your elbows while keeping upper arms fixed.

exercises.name: Tricep Kickback
exercises.description: Hinge forward with a dumbbell, pin your upper arm to your side and extend the forearm back until your arm is fully straight.

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.description: Place the bar on your upper traps, squat down by pushing your hips back and bending your knees until your thighs are at least parallel, then drive up.

exercises.name: Front Squat
exercises.description: Rest the bar on your front delts with elbows high, squat down keeping your torso upright, then drive up through your heels.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.description: Sit in the leg press machine with feet shoulder-width on the platform, lower the sled by bending your knees to 90 degrees, then press back up.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.description: Sit in the leg extension machine with the pad on your shins, extend your legs to full lockout, squeezing the quads at the top.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.description: Stand in a lunge position with your rear foot elevated on a bench, lower until your front thigh is parallel, then drive up through the front heel.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.description: Hold a dumbbell or kettlebell at chest height, squat down between your legs keeping your torso upright, then stand back up.

exercises.name: Hack Squat
exercises.description: Stand on the hack squat machine platform with your back against the pad, squat down to parallel and press back up.

exercises.name: Walking Lunge
exercises.description: Step forward into a lunge, lowering your back knee toward the floor, then drive through the front foot and step the rear leg forward into the next rep.

exercises.name: Pistol Squat
exercises.description: Stand on one leg with the other extended in front, squat all the way down on the standing leg, then press back up without assistance.

exercises.name: Sissy Squat
exercises.description: Stand upright, lean back at the knees while rising onto your toes, lowering your knees forward and down, then return to standing.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.description: Hold a barbell at hip height, push your hips back with a slight knee bend, lowering the bar along your legs until you feel a deep hamstring stretch, then drive hips forward.

exercises.name: Lying Leg Curl
exercises.description: Lie face down on the leg curl machine, curl the pad toward your glutes by flexing your knees, squeezing the hamstrings at the top.

exercises.name: Seated Leg Curl
exercises.description: Sit in the leg curl machine with the pad behind your ankles, curl it down and back by flexing your knees against the resistance.

exercises.name: Stiff-Leg Deadlift
exercises.description: Stand with a barbell and keep your legs nearly straight, hinge at the hips lowering the bar toward the floor, then return to standing.

exercises.name: Good Morning
exercises.description: Place a barbell on your upper back, hinge forward at the hips with a slight knee bend until your torso is near parallel, then return upright.

exercises.name: Nordic Hamstring Curl
exercises.description: Kneel with your feet anchored, slowly lower your body forward under control using your hamstrings, then curl back up or push off the floor to reset.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Swing
exercises.description: Hinge at the hips and swing a kettlebell between your legs, then explosively drive your hips forward to propel the bell to chest height.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Romanian Deadlift
exercises.description: Stand on one leg, hinge forward while extending the free leg behind you for balance, lowering the weight until you feel a hamstring stretch, then return.

exercises.name: Hip Thrust
exercises.description: Sit with your upper back on a bench and a barbell across your hips, drive your hips up until your thighs are parallel to the floor, squeezing the glutes hard at the top.

exercises.name: Barbell Glute Bridge
exercises.description: Lie on the floor with a barbell over your hips, feet flat, drive your hips up squeezing your glutes at the top, then lower back down.

exercises.name: Cable Kickback
exercises.description: Attach an ankle strap to a low cable, face the machine and kick one leg straight back by extending at the hip, squeezing the glute at full extension.

exercises.name: Step-Up
exercises.description: Stand in front of a box or bench holding dumbbells, step up driving through the lead foot, fully extend at the top, then step back down.

exercises.name: Sumo Deadlift
exercises.description: Stand with a wide stance and toes pointed out, grip the bar inside your knees, drive through the floor to stand tall by extending hips and knees.

exercises.name: Glute-Ham Raise
exercises.description: Lock your feet in a GHD machine, lower your torso forward under control, then curl back up using your hamstrings and glutes.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Hip Thrust
exercises.description: Set up like a hip thrust but extend one leg out, drive through the planted foot to lift your hips, squeezing the working glute at the top.

exercises.name: Frog Pump
exercises.description: Lie on your back with soles of your feet together and knees flared out, drive your hips up squeezing your glutes, then lower back down.

exercises.name: Plank
exercises.description: Hold a push-up position on your forearms, keeping your body in a straight line from head to heels while bracing your core.

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.description: Hang from a pull-up bar with straight arms, raise your legs to parallel or higher by flexing at the hips, then lower under control.

exercises.name: Ab Wheel Rollout
exercises.description: Kneel holding an ab wheel, roll forward extending your body as far as you can while maintaining a braced core, then roll back to the start.

exercises.name: Cable Crunch
exercises.description: Kneel in front of a high cable with a rope attachment behind your head, crunch downward by flexing your spine, bringing your elbows toward your knees.

exercises.name: Russian Twist
exercises.description: Sit with knees bent and feet off the floor, lean back slightly and rotate your torso side to side, optionally holding a weight.

exercises.name: L-Sit
exercises.description: Support yourself on parallel bars or the floor with straight arms, hold your legs extended straight in front of you parallel to the ground.

exercises.name: Dragon Flag
exercises.description: Lie on a bench gripping behind your head, lift your entire body as a rigid lever, then lower under control without letting your hips sag.

exercises.name: Hollow Body Hold
exercises.description: Lie on your back, press your lower back into the floor, extend your arms overhead and legs out, holding a curved position with everything off the ground.

exercises.name: Bicycle Crunch
exercises.description: Lie on your back with hands behind your head, alternate bringing each elbow to the opposite knee in a pedaling motion.

exercises.name: Toes-to-Bar
exercises.description: Hang from a pull-up bar and swing your legs up until your toes touch the bar, using a controlled kip or strict hip flexion.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.description: Stand on a calf raise machine or step with the balls of your feet on the edge, raise up onto your toes as high as possible, then lower for a full stretch.

exercises.name: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.description: Sit in a seated calf raise machine with the pad on your knees, press up through the balls of your feet and squeeze at the top.

exercises.name: Donkey Calf Raise
exercises.description: Bend forward at the hips with your toes on a raised surface, rise up onto your toes with a deep stretch at the bottom of each rep.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Calf Raise
exercises.description: Stand on one foot on a step or platform edge, perform a calf raise through full range of motion, using a wall for balance if needed.

exercises.name: Muscle-Up
exercises.description: Hang from a bar, perform an explosive pull-up transitioning above the bar into a dip, finishing with arms fully extended on top.

exercises.name: Burpee
exercises.description: Drop into a squat, kick your feet back into a push-up position, perform a push-up, jump your feet forward, and explosively jump up.

exercises.name: Turkish Get-Up
exercises.description: Lie on the floor holding a weight overhead with one arm, stand up through a sequence of movements while keeping the weight locked out above you.

exercises.name: Farmer's Walk
exercises.description: Pick up heavy dumbbells or kettlebells in each hand, walk with tall posture and braced core for distance or time.

exercises.name: Front Lever
exercises.description: Hang from a bar and hold your body horizontal face-up with straight arms, engaging your lats and core to maintain the position.

exercises.name: Back Lever
exercises.description: Hang from a bar and rotate your body to a horizontal face-down position with straight arms, holding using your shoulders and back.

exercises.name: Planche Push-Up
exercises.description: From a planche or tuck planche position with hands by your hips, lower and press your body while keeping your feet off the ground.

exercises.name: Archer Push-Up
exercises.description: Start in a wide push-up position, shift your weight to one arm as you lower, keeping the other arm straight out to the side, then press back up.

exercises.name: Band Pull-Apart
exercises.description: Hold a resistance band in front of you at shoulder height, pull it apart by squeezing your rear delts and retracting your shoulder blades.

exercises.name: Band Assisted Pull-Up
exercises.description: Loop a resistance band over the bar and under your foot, perform a pull-up with the band assisting the hardest part of the movement.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Pullover
exercises.description: Lie across a bench holding a dumbbell overhead with both hands, lower it behind your head in an arc, then pull it back over your chest.

exercises.name: Landmine Press
exercises.description: Hold the end of a barbell anchored at the floor at shoulder height, press it up and forward at an angle, alternating arms or using both.

exercises.name: Reverse Lunge
exercises.description: Stand holding dumbbells, step one foot backward and lower until both knees are at 90 degrees, then drive through the front foot to return.

exercises.name: Zercher Squat
exercises.description: Hold a barbell in the crook of your elbows against your torso, squat down to depth keeping your chest up, then stand back up.

exercises.name: Pallof Press
exercises.description: Stand sideways to a cable set at chest height, hold the handle at your chest and press it straight out, resisting the rotational pull.
